fields.description: Minimum credits the student must earn from courses in this track. These count toward the program's total credits for completion.
fields.label: Track Credits Required

fields.description: Maximum credits from this track that count toward the degree (0 = unlimited). Credits beyond this cap are earned but do not count toward the program total.
fields.label: Track Credits Ceiling

fields.description: Check this box if this is a Program Emphasis. If not checked, this track will serve to organize number of credits for this track (e.g. the program requires 6 hours in Greek, but 8 different courses may be chosen to fill this requirement).
fields.label: Program Emphasis?

fields.description: Mark this as the fallback emphasis (e.g. General Studies) for students who do not declare or meet a specific emphasis. Only one per program.
fields.label: Fallback Emphasis?

fields.description: At Enrollment: student must choose before submitting enrollment. Anytime: can be declared at any point. Auto-grant: automatically assigned when track requirements are met.
fields.label: Emphasis Declaration

fields.description: Minimum total program credits the student must have earned before declaring this emphasis.
fields.label: Min Credits to Declare

fields.description: If checked, this emphasis is informational only and does not affect graduation requirements.
fields.label: Advisory Only
